pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script where DATA_FILE variable is set
setup_task.sh script wget command downloading from opengeos repo, confirmed via python rasterio script that the file is a 4-band GeoTIFF

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real 4-band Landsat GeoTIFF image directly downloaded from the opengeos GitHub repository (data_is_synthetic is false). It was verified through setup scripts and code analysis that the input data path is /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif, and the expected outputs are a DIMAP product at /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_pca.dim and a GeoTIFF export at /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_pca.tif. The expected derived band name is exactly 'spectral_anomaly'. All metadata claims are accurate.
